Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_JPEG

A type that identifies the Joint Photographic Experts Group (JPEG) format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_JPEG: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
